query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Dubai
Destination: Marsa Matruh
Dates: 2026-07-09 to 2026-07-12
Budget: Cheap
Party: Friends
Interests: Camel Riding, Nile Cruise, Eco Tourism, Road Trips

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan JSON is well-formed and follows a logical structure for a travel itinerary, including trip details, itinerary, budget breakdown, and landmarks.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace is located in Marsa Matruh, and its categorization as 'mid-range' with an estimated cost of EGP 3600 for 3 nights aligns well with the 'Budget' preference for friends.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The overall estimated cost of EGP 9600 (approx. USD 200) per person for 4 days, including accommodation, food, and activities, is consistent with a 'Cheap' or 'Budget' travel preference.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Each day's activities are structured in a chronological order, moving from morning to evening, making the itinerary easy to follow.

judge_grader.reason: The travel plan assumes the trip starts from Cairo, but the user specified Dubai as the origin city. This is a mismatch in the starting point and implies unfulfilled travel segments and costs.

generated_plan.trip_name: Marsa Matruh Coastal Escape: Friends' Edition
generated_plan.trip_summary: A four-day road trip for friends from Cairo to Marsa Matruh, exploring beautiful coastal attractions, cultural sites, and local cuisine on a budget, embracing the interests of eco-tourism and road trips.

activities.title: Road Trip to Marsa Matruh
activities.description: Embark on a scenic road trip from Cairo to the beautiful coastal city of Marsa Matruh, enjoying the journey with friends.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch featuring local and international chef's specials at New Sultana, rated 3.9/5.

activities.title: Salt Cave Salman
activities.description: Explore the unique Salt Cave Salman, a popular cultural attraction in Marsa Matruh with a rating of 4.2 stars.

activities.title: Sidi El-Awwam Mosque
activities.description: Visit the revered Sidi El-Awwam Mosque, a significant religious and cultural landmark, highly popular with a rating of 4.6 stars.

activities.title: Check-in at Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace
activities.description: Check into your comfortable accommodation at the Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace, your base for the Marsa Matruh adventure.

activities.title: Relax at شاطئ رأس الحكمة
activities.description: Unwind and enjoy the evening breeze at شاطئ رأس الحكمة, a popular tourist destination with a rating of 4.4 stars.

activities.title: Dinner at Rommel House Restaurant
activities.description: Savor dinner with local and international chef's specials at Rommel House Restaurant, rated 3.9/5.

activities.title: Morning Walk at ممشي الخمارى السياحى
activities.description: Start your day with a refreshing walk along ممشي الخمارى السياحى, a popular walkway rated 4.6 stars.

activities.title: Explore Ava ممشي مطروح
activities.description: Continue your exploration at Ava ممشي مطروح, another popular walking area in Marsa Matruh with a rating of 4.5 stars.

activities.title: Lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant, offering local and international cuisine with a rating of 4.0/5.

activities.title: Adventure at اكوا بارك كيلوباترا
activities.description: Spend your afternoon enjoying the rides and attractions at اكوا بارك كيلوباترا, a fun spot rated 3.9 stars.

activities.title: Visit سيڤانا ترافيل and مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓
activities.description: Discover سيڤانا ترافيل (5 stars) and مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓ (3.9 stars), popular local spots for travel information or souvenirs.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد
activities.description: Indulge in a delightful dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد, known for its local and international chef's specials and rated 4.2/5.

activities.title: Visit Rommel's Cave Museum
activities.description: Start your day with a visit to the historic Rommel's Cave Museum, a fascinating cultural attraction rated 4 stars.

activities.title: Explore Rommel's Beach Surroundings
activities.description: Discover the scenic صخرة شاطئ روميل (5 stars) and جبل روميل مطروح (4.5 stars), offering stunning views and historical connections.

activities.title: Lunch at MR.Chick
activities.description: Enjoy a highly-rated lunch at MR.Chick, specializing in local and international cuisine with an impressive 4.9/5 rating.

activities.title: Relax at the Beach (5057082)
activities.description: Spend a relaxing afternoon at the Beach (5057082), a popular spot for leisure and enjoying the coastal ambiance, rated 3.7 stars.

activities.title: Stroll at ممشي الافاتار avatar
activities.description: Take an evening stroll along ممشي الافاتار avatar, a charming promenade in Mersa Matruh, rated 4.5 stars.

activities.title: Dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر
activities.description: Conclude your day with dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر, known for its excellent local and international chef's specials and rated 4.8/5.

activities.title: Visit Cleopatra Bath
activities.description: Explore the historic Cleopatra Bath, a significant cultural site in Marsa Matruh with a rating of 4.4 stars.

activities.title: Discover لسان شط الغرام & ممشي باب البحر
activities.description: Enjoy the scenic views at لسان شط الغرام (4.6 stars) and take a leisurely walk along ممشي باب البحر (4.5 stars), both popular coastal attractions.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Have your final lunch in Marsa Matruh at New Sultana, a restaurant offering local and international chef's specials, rated 3.9/5.

activities.title: Relax at شمسيات شاطئ زمرده & مصيد koko
activities.description: Spend a relaxing afternoon at the popular beach areas of شمسيات شاطئ زمرده (3.5 stars) and مصيد koko (4.0 stars) for some last-minute sun and sea.

activities.title: Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check out from Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace and prepare for departure.

activities.title: Early Dinner at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Enjoy an early dinner at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي, known for its local and international cuisine with a rating of 4.1/5, before heading back.

activities.title: Departure to Cairo
activities.description: Begin your journey back to Cairo, reflecting on the wonderful memories made in Marsa Matruh.

budget_breakdown: Flights/Transport: EGP 0 (Assuming car for road trip, fuel cost not included)
Accommodation: EGP 3600 (3 nights at Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace)
Food: EGP 2000 (Estimated for 4 days of lunches and dinners, per person)
Activities: EGP 4000 (Estimated for all attractions, per person)
Total Estimated Cost: EGP 9600 (Per person estimate, excluding personal shopping and transport)
